name: First State Bank
description_short: Tahlequah, OK's First State Bank branch at 1111 S Muskogee Ave offers in-person banking services to local residents.
description_long:
First State Bank's Tahlequah location is situated at 1111 S Muskogee Ave in the heart of Tahlequah, OK. This community bank branch serves residents and businesses with in-person banking services, providing direct access to tellers and banking professionals. The branch is staffed to handle account inquiries, deposits, withdrawals, and financial consultations for Tahlequah customers.

The Tahlequah branch offers core banking services including deposit accounts, savings products, account opening, and personalized financial consultations. Customers can discuss checking and savings options, loan products, and other banking solutions tailored to their needs. Contact the branch directly to confirm current hours and service availability.

When visiting First State Bank in Tahlequah, bring a valid government ID for account transactions. This branch is ideal for residents who prefer face-to-face banking over online services. The Tahlequah location emphasizes personalized service and community relationships.
services: Personal checking accounts (Kasasa Cash, Tiger Club, Interest NOW, Freedom 55, Carefree, College, Teen)
Personal savings and money market accounts
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) and CDARS products
Business checking accounts (small business, commercial, non-profit)
Business savings and money market accounts
Home loans and mortgage financing (Rocket Mortgage-powered)
Commercial loans and commercial real estate loans
Farm and ranch loans with working capital lines
Small business loans including SBA and USDA B&I loans
Digital banking, mobile check deposit, Zelle, and online account opening
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government full faith and credit
High-yield savings options through Kasasa products (6.00% APY on qualifying deposits up to $20,000)
Comprehensive loan suite including specialized agriculture, SBA, and USDA B&I lending
Family-owned community bank with headquarters in Tahlequah, emphasizing local decision-making
Multiple account types designed for specific customer segments (teen accounts, college accounts, non-profit checking)
Digital banking tools including mobile check deposit, Zelle, and online account opening
Instant-issue debit cards available through local branches
Mortgage loans powered by Rocket Mortgage for streamlined home financing
cons: Limited geographic service area (appears to be primarily Oklahoma-based, specifically Tahlequah/Cherokee County region)
Most loan rates and terms not disclosed online; requires direct inquiry or branch visit
Website content suggests more traditional banking model with potentially fewer advanced digital features compared to national banks or fintech competitors
Limited information about business service fees, monthly maintenance costs, or minimum balance requirements
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking FDIC-insured community banking with personalized local service
Farmers, ranchers, and agricultural businesses needing specialized farm and ranch lending
Small business owners seeking SBA and USDA lending options with local relationship banking
Homebuyers in the Tahlequah/Cherokee County area wanting pre-approval and local mortgage processing
diagnosis: First State Bank is best for Oklahoma residents and businesses seeking FDIC-insured community banking with personalized local service, particularly those needing specialized agricultural lending or SBA financing. The main caveat is geographic limitation to the Tahlequah/Oklahoma region and the need for direct contact to obtain current rates and specific loan terms not published online.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: First State Bank at 1111 S Muskogee Ave, Tahlequah, OK. Community banking with personalized service.
